title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO. M.G. Siegler discusses why this timing matters relative to OpenAI, the current capabilities of Claude, and whether Anthropic needs the capital raise.
